title: EVERLASTO Quality 20m 'Orient' PVC Clothes/Washing Line 4.8mm Thick - GREEN
features: PREMIUM - Our finest 'Flagship' line. A 'proper' clothesline from a bygone era of quality, named after the mill in Bolton they were first produced in the 1960's.
THICK - At 4.8mm this is one of the thickest on the market, holds pegs well. Much thicker than the cheap imported substitutes. Capable of holding even the heaviest loads of washing.

STRONG - Made with a 3 strand cabled poly core for strength. The unique design of this clothesline with a twisted poly rope core gives this line a similar strength to a steel core line without the need for a wire centre which can rust and snap.
DURABLE - Has a wipe clean, weatherproof PVC outer for durability. Simply wipe clean with a damp cloth and the line will look good as new. This line will give years of service.

PRACTICAL - Comes with a line tensioner to easily tighten the line. Simply feed through the tensioner and around a fixing point and back through the tensioner and knot. Once the line is loaded simply slide the tensioner along the line to add tension.
BRAND HERITAGE: A quality Everlasto product from James Lever of Bolton, UK cordage manufacturers since 1856 and the recognised name for clotheslines in the UK.
description: EVERLASTO Orient Clothes Line 20M Green. Made with a strong 3 strand polypropylene core and wipe clean PVC outer. Approx 4.8mm thick. A qualoity Everlasto product from James Lever, Bolton, England.
